title: Mellow Shattering French Sesame Seed Crusted Fish Pot Au Feu
description: A winey and shattering French dish from Brittany featuring sesame seed crust, perfect for a solo dinner, this low-carb-friendly pot-au-feu is a delight to savor. The sesame seed crust adds a delightful crunch to the fish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, whisk together sesame seeds, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Place the cod fish in a separate bowl and brush with olive oil and lemon juice.
Coat the fish with the sesame seed mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the fish in a pot-au-feu dish and add white wine.
Cover the dish with a lid and bake for 12 minutes.
Remove the lid and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
